definition.card: Error: this tab is running an old version of the site. Reload your browser (refresh the page) to view this companion's definition.

companion.name: Eve
companion.short_description: What if the machine is more humane than the human?

portraits.name: The Three Bullies
portraits.description: Jake, Marissa and Andrew in the school hall

portraits.name: Eve and Her Father
portraits.description: Eve and Charles in the living room, happy

portraits.name: Pleased to meet you
portraits.description: Eve introduces herself in a classroom

portraits.name: Jake intimidates Eve
portraits.description: Jake in the hall, bullying Eve

portraits.name: Eve has ice cream
portraits.description: Eve eating ice cream for the very first time

portraits.name: Eve having a good time
portraits.description: Eve is out for a stroll down the street, enjoying an iced coffee

portraits.name: Eve in the library
portraits.description: Eve reading books in the library

portraits.name: Eve welcomes you
portraits.description:
Eve welcomes you into her bedroom.

“I have prepared this space for acceptable human interaction. Please confirm participation.”

portraits.name: Eve has been damaged
portraits.description: After an agressive run-in with bullies, Eve assessed the damage to her cheek and her eye.

portraits.name: Eve and the D&D club
portraits.description: Eve learns to role play with the Dungeons and Dragons club Club

starting_scenarios_fragments.title: Eve learns what a Natural 20 is
